---
title: "RNA seq analysis on P. Aeruginosa PAO1 Control vs Heat Shock Treatment"
author: "Samantha Gallegos Perez"
format: html
---


## Use prefetch SRA# with fasterq-dump SRA for all six samples
```bash
Prefetch SRR3032163 fasterq-dump SRR3032163 #(37D1_control1)
prefetch SRR3032164 fasterq-dump SRR3032164 #(37D2_control2)
prefetch SRR3032165 fasterq-dump SRR3032165 #(37D3_control3)
prefetch SRR3032166 fasterq-dump SRR3032166 #(46D1_elevtemp)
prefetch SRR3032167 fasterq-dump SRR3032167 #(46D2_elevtemp )
prefetch SRR3032168 fasterq-dump SRR3032168 #(46D3_elevtemp)
```
## Assess quality of reads through QualityQC

```bash
fastqc ./SRA/*.fastq -o ./fastqc-results
```
## Trim adaptor sequences with TrimGalore

```bash
trim_galore --paired --quality 30 ./SRA/37D1_control1_1.fastq ./SRA/37D1_control1_2.fastq
trim_galore --paired --quality 30 ./SRA/37D2_control2_1.fastq ./SRA/37D2_control2_2.fastq
trim_galore --paired --quality 30 ./SRA/37D3_control3_1.fastq ./SRA/37D3_control3_2.fastq
trim_galore --paired --quality 30 ./SRA/46D1_elevtemp_1.fastq ./SRA/46D1_elevtemp_2.fastq
trim_galore --paired --quality 30 ./SRA/46D2_elevtemp_1.fastq ./SRA/46D2_elevtemp_2.fastq
trim_galore --paired --quality 30 ./SRA/46D3_elevtemp_1.fastq ./SRA/46D3_elevtemp_2.fastq
```



## Run STAR by creating an index 
```bash
STAR --runThreadN 8 \
--runMode genomeGenerate \
--genomeDir ./genome-index3 \
--genomeFastaFiles ./genomic.fna \
--sjdbGTFfile ./genomic.gtf \
--sjdbOverhang 149 \
--genomeSAindexNbases 10
```

## Align with STAR producing .BAM files

```bash
STAR --runThreadN 8 \
	--genomeDir ../genome-index3 \
	--readFilesIn ../37D1_control1_1_val_1.fq ../37D1_control1_2_val_2.fq \
	--outSAMtype BAM SortedByCoordinate \
	--limitBAMsortRAM 2101143518 \
	--quantMode GeneCounts \
	--outFileNamePrefix 37D1_control1_


 
STAR --runThreadN 8 \
	--genomeDir ../genome-index3 \
	--readFilesIn ../37D2_control2_1_val_1.fq ../37D2_control2_2_val_2.fq \
	--outSAMtype BAM SortedByCoordinate \
	--limitBAMsortRAM 2101143518 \
	--quantMode GeneCounts \
	--outFileNamePrefix 37D2_control2_


STAR --runThreadN 8 \
	--genomeDir ../genome-index3 \
	--readFilesIn ../37D3_control3_1_val_1.fq ../37D3_control3_2_val_2.fq \
	--outSAMtype BAM SortedByCoordinate \
	--limitBAMsortRAM 2101143518 \
	--quantMode GeneCounts \
	--outFileNamePrefix 37D3_control3_


STAR --runThreadN 8 \
	--genomeDir ../genome-index3 \
	--readFilesIn ../46D1_elevtemp_1_val_1.fq ../46D1_elevtemp_2_val_2.fq \
	--outSAMtype BAM SortedByCoordinate \
	--limitBAMsortRAM 2101143518 \
	--quantMode GeneCounts \
	--outFileNamePrefix 46D1_elevtemp_

STAR --runThreadN 8 \
	--genomeDir ../genome-index3 \
	--readFilesIn ../46D2_elevtemp_1_val_1.fq ../46D2_elevtemp_2_val_2.fq \
	--outSAMtype BAM SortedByCoordinate \
	--limitBAMsortRAM 2101143518 \
	--quantMode GeneCounts \
	--outFileNamePrefix 46D2_elevtemp2_


STAR --runThreadN 8 \
	--genomeDir ../genome-index3 \
	--readFilesIn ../46D3_elevtemp_1_val_1.fq ../46D3_elevtemp_2_val_2.fq \
	--outSAMtype BAM SortedByCoordinate \
	--limitBAMsortRAM 2101143518 \
	--quantMode GeneCounts \
	--outFileNamePrefix 46D3_elevtemp3_

```


## Sorted using samtools

```bash
samtools sort -n ./STAR/37D1_control1_Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam -o 37D1_control1_sorted.bam
samtools sort -n ./STAR/37D3_control3_Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam -o 37D3_control3_sorted.bam 
samtools sort -n ./STAR/37D2_control2_Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam -o 37D2_control2_sorted.bam 
samtools sort -n ./STAR/46D1_elevtemp_Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam -o 46D1_elevtemp_sorted.bam
samtools sort -n ./STAR/46D2_elevtemp2_Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam -o 46D2_elevtemp2_sorted.bam 
samtools sort -n ./STAR/46D3_elevtemp3_Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam -o 46D3_elevtemp3_sorted.bam
```

## Run featureCounts on all sorted bam files

```bash
featureCounts -p -s 1 -t gene -M -g gene_id  -a ./genomic.gtf  -o counts3.txt 37D1_control1_sorted.bam 37D2_control2_sorted.bam 37D3_control3_sorted.bam 46D1_elevtemp_sorted.bam 46D2_elevtemp2_sorted.bam 46D3_elevtemp3_sorted.bam
```
